mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee_info ( id_card, name, gender, birth_date, phone, email, address, hire_date, status, education_level, emergency_contact, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{idCard}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{birthDate}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{address}, #{hireDate}, #{status}, #{educationLevel}, #{emergencyContact}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT employee_id, id_card, name, gender, birth_date, phone, email, address, hire_date, status, education_level, emergency_contact, created_at, updated_at FROM employee_info WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND status != 'deleted'

SELECT employee_id, id_card, name, gender, birth_date, phone, email, address, hire_date, status, education_level, emergency_contact, created_at, updated_at FROM employee_info WHERE id_card = #{idCard} AND status != 'deleted'

SELECT e.employee_id, e.id_card, e.name, e.gender, e.birth_date, e.phone, e.email, e.address, e.hire_date, e.status, e.education_level, e.emergency_contact, e.created_at, e.updated_at, d.dept_name AS primary_dept_name, p.position_name AS primary_position_name FROM employee_info e LEFT JOIN assignment_info a ON e.employee_id = a.employee_id AND a.is_primary = true AND a.status = 'active' LEFT JOIN department_info d ON a.dept_id = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN position_info p ON a.position_id = p.position_id WHERE e.employee_id = #{employeeId} AND e.status != 'deleted'
